series_metadata.series_title: Medicaid Interim/Final Settlement & Rate Setting Packages
series_metadata.series_description: Interim/final settlements and rate setting packages of services provided by Medicaid providers, ex. Medicaid School Program (MSP), hospitals, PASSPORTS, public developmental centers, lead investigation, clinics. File contains but is not limited to cost report forms, settlement and rate setting work papers, settlement spreadsheets and other documentation supporting the interim/final settlements and rate setting/rate adjustments.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: In office and /or in storage, from adjudication date or date used rate setting purposes ; Electronic: On department computers or department''s shared drives, from adjudication date or date used rate setting purposes
